title: Array Technologies to Acquire APA Solar
text: Array Technologies has agreed to acquire APA Solar, Ohio-based foundation and fixed-tilt mounting manufacturer, for approximately $179 million (excluding 45X credits). Acquisition enables Array to offer integrated tracker and foundation system for utility-scale solar projects. Array CEO Kevin Hostetler noted that demand for engineered foundations is growing rapidly because of their ability to make projects in areas with more challenging soil conditions economically viable. Following acquisition, Array will provide combined tracker and foundation solutions for projects with difficult soil conditions. Continue offering APA's foundation systems to other tracker manufacturers. Maintain APA's fixed-tilt racking product line. APA's leadership team, including CEO Josh Von Deylen and COO Joe Von Deylen, will remain with company and lead Array's new Foundation Solutions Business. Company will maintain headquarters and manufacturing operations in Ridgeville Corners, Ohio. Deal responds to growing industry demand for engineered foundation solutions that make economically viable solar installations in challenging soil conditions increasingly common in new projects.
